name: MULTIPLE ENDOCRINE NEOPLASIA
definition: MEN = MULTIPLE ENDOCRINE ADENOMAS (MEA) familial autosomal dominant adenomatous hyperplasia characterized by neoplasia of 2 or WERMER SYNDROME autosomal dominant syndrome with 95% penetrance SIPPLE DISEASE = MEN TYPE 2A autosomal dominant cancer syndrome MUCOSAL NEUROMA SYNDROME = MEN TYPE 2B
